notes: One walker plus far-clutter ghost sources (diffuse 100..180 m bands). The far clutter is deliberately NOT truth - emissions there must show up as ghosts.
All times are seconds from the first frame of the fixture.
Leg 1: walker approaches 69->30 m, stop-and-go, az drifts +3..-16 deg so no gating az.
Leg 2: walker recedes 40->52 m at az ~ -38 deg (gating az, +/-6 window covers the measured -34..-41 drift).
